name: Gyaru Life TF
description: You know something is wrong. This isn't the life you had. The people around you think you were always like this. As each day goes by, you forget more about your old male life and remember more about always being a gyaru gal. Your reality slowly warps as bits and pieces of your life change to fit your new gyaru life. You have a feeling someone or something did this to you, but do you care enough to find out?
creator: Ryuken Shiro
